hero.title: Academics
hero.subtitle: A thoughtfully designed curriculum that prepares children for the world ahead.

programs.title: Pre-K & Kindergarten
programs.description: Play-based learning rooted in the Montessori and Reggio Emilia approaches. Focus on sensory development, language, and social skills.

programs.title: Primary School (Grades 1–5)
programs.description: CBSE-aligned curriculum enriched with STEAM projects, reading programmes, and experiential learning trips.

programs.title: Middle School (Grades 6–8)
programs.description: Rigorous academic preparation with elective options, leadership development, and inter-school competitions.

approach.title: Our Teaching Approach
points: Inquiry-based learning that puts the child at the centre
